meaning: adj.[生理][心]联觉的,牵连感觉的,共同感觉的
examples: "Synaesthetic pain" occurs mainly in people who have lost a limb.
The New York-based artist first discovered she could paint her synaesthetic visions after a visit to her acupuncturist.
Some amputees are already known to experience phantom limb pain - a feeling of pain in a limb that is no longer there - but synaesthetic pain is different.
